notes: Meridian Heritage Interactive, New Portland Arcology (2048) · HERITAGE REMAKE. The licensed rebuild of Ines Rocha's The Tideline (2004): every station kept, every observation kept, every string kept — and the two-line limit removed, because limits test poorly. The limit was the game. One original interaction survives, at station 11, per license §4(c). Tem's cart.
